---
title: "Data Axle"
page-layout: article
---

# Data Axle

## Description

Business directory containing current and historical information on millions of U.S. and Canadian companies. Useful for business demographics, market analysis, and geographic research.

## Listing categories

- **Subject area:** Business & Economics, Social Sciences, GIS & Spatial Data
- **Data/resource type:** Company & Organization Data, News & Current Events, Geospatial & Mapping Data
- **Access model:** WRDS Account Required, Yale Licensed
- **Displayed topic:** Company & Organization Data, News & Current Events, Geospatial & Mapping Data

## Links

- [Access resource](https://library.yale.edu/eresources/access/access-data-axle-reference-solutions)

[Back to Datasets & Databases](../datasets.qmd)
